git_exposure.description: Exposed .git directory -- download repository contents including source code, credentials, and commit history

probes.description: Git HEAD file -- if accessible, contains current branch ref confirming .git directory is exposed. Use git-dumper to extract full repo.
Git config -- contains remote URL (may include credentials), author info, branch tracking. Often blocked but .git/HEAD is not.

svn_exposure.description: Exposed .svn directory -- download Subversion metadata including source code and credentials

probes.description: SVN entries file (pre-1.7) -- contains file listing and revision info of the working copy
SVN SQLite database (1.7+) -- contains full working copy metadata including file paths and checksums

env_file_exposure.description: Exposed environment/config files -- .env, config.yml, settings files containing credentials and API keys

probes.description: .env file -- contains environment variables (DB passwords, API keys, secret keys). Most critical file to check.
.env.backup -- backup copy of .env file, often with production credentials

debug_endpoints.description: Exposed debug/admin endpoints -- Spring Actuator, Django debug, PHP info pages leaking configuration

probes.description: Spring Actuator environment -- dumps all environment properties including database credentials and secrets
Go expvar debug endpoint -- exposes internal variables and runtime stats
